metadata.title: It Looms Closer
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Hope Is A Cancer
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - The Oldest Have Seen Our Damnation; The Youngest Will See Our Conclusion
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - The Taunting Of The Light Is Eternal
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - It Looms Closer
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Stare With Us, Into The Great Nothing
06 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - The Throes Of What We Call Survival
